name: @prisma-next/example-multi-extension-monorepo
description: Worked example: monorepo with two internal contract-space packages and an aggregating app. Exercises the framework's per-space planner/runner/verifier with multiple extensions in one application.

scripts.build:contract-spaces: cd packages/audit && prisma-next contract emit && cd ../feature-flags && prisma-next contract emit && cd ../../app && prisma-next contract emit
